g.text: Toolchain-aware execution turns compiler output into targeted repair loops.
The agent treats CMake, compiler, flags, failed headers, retries, and test aftermath as state.

g.text: fatal error C1083: cannot open include file: 'physics/solver.hpp'
The active model can change without losing task state, artifacts, or error history.
Claude hit rate limit during repair step 3 of 5.
Context engine emitted a continuity pack with logs and changed files.
Gemini resumed the same compile recovery loop and finished the fix.
